response.overview: The film opens with the parade of carriages and pedestrians heading to the National Stadium on the opening day of the tournament. Next, the members of the delegations, sports authorities, spectators, and teams participating in the championship appear on screen. Then come the matches and their exciting moments, with some scenes from our footballers' training in Ancón shown on the screen beforehand. The captions, well-written and engaging, were created by our colleague, Mr. Luis Palma, sports editor of the leading newspaper.
response.title: Campeonato Sudamericano de Fútbol
